---
title: "Membuat data sendiri"
subtitle: "tempaltemembuat data sendiri"
author: "Albani"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: Journal          # atau: cosmo, cerulean, journal, lumen, simplex
    highlight: tango       # default, tango, paygments. kate, monochrome, espresso, zenburn, haddock, breezedark. textmate 
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: hide     # none, hide, show
---


Output bisa dengan : 
beamer_presentation
context_document
github_document
html_document
ioslides_presentation
latex_document
md_document
odt_document
pdf_document
powerpoint_presentation
rtf_document
slidy_presentation
word_document
